calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Continued To Feb-14-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley, 225.

Donald Ma, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Angelica Tinio, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Josephina Tumanguil.
Default was entered against defendant Josephina Tumanguil on June 30, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Amado Tumanguil was filed on June 25, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 16,2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Angelica Tinio, and against the Defaulted Defendant Josephina Tumanguil as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,000.00.
Costs - $375.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $100,375.00.

The Court also finds that defendant Josephina Tumanguil made representations to plaintiff knowing they were false. The representations were made with the intent to defraud plaintiff.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
